Bash(cd /Users/alex/Development/gremlin/web/src && ls -1 components/*.svelte | sed 's|.*/||' | while read comp; do
  compname="${comp%.svelte}"
  if grep -qr "$compname" . --include="*.svelte" --exclude="$comp"; then
    echo "USED: $comp"
  else
    echo "UNUSED: $comp"
  fi
done)
